latest_failed_or_blocked_task.title: Adopt local worker as the primary route and park cloud API path
latest_failed_or_blocked_task.request: Repository-only update. Treat the GitHub-hosted OpenAI API / cloud Codex Action path as intentionally abandoned for now because it requires separate API billing/quota. Keep existing workflow files installed but parked. Do not run `openai/codex-action@v1`; do not require `OPENAI_API_KEY`; do not read, print, log, commit, or expose secrets, tokens, passwords, API keys, environment dumps, recipient configuration, or private local paths. Make the local Mac mini / Codex desktop worker the documented primary route.
